snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen… hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni…hayee
Saada si jo adaa’ein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab’e Ghum guzaar ke
Weera’an hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

Connect:

Khan (https://www.instagram.com/soundslikekhan/)
Noor (https://www.instagram.com/noor_wav/)
Madhurxo (https://www.instagram.com/madhuraaara/)

snippet.description:
Nohay 2026 | Sher E Babbar Abbas | Noha 2026 Farhan Ali Waris | Muharram | 2026 | 1448

Syed Farhan Ali Waris Presents " Haider E Karbala Abbas " New Noha 2026 i.e Hazrat Mola Ghazi Abbas Alamdar Noha.

Kalam Details |
Poetry | Mazhar Abidi
Composed by | Own Rizvi

Audio |

Special Thanks | FAW Team & Syed Hassan Ayaz Jaffri, Syed Qamber Ali, Meesum Zaidi, Mohsin Hashmi, Safdar Kaleem Rizvi

يا عباس يا قمر بني هاشم
یا ساقی عطاشا کربلا
یا علمدارِ وفا، یا باب الحوائج
یا أبا الفضل العباس (عليه السلام)

This noha is presented in remembrance of Hazrat Abbas ibn Ali (عليه السلام), the unmatched standard bearer of Karbala and the symbol of loyalty, bravery, and divine obedience. The son of Imam Ali (عليه السلام) and the blessed prayer of Bibi Fatima (سلام الله عليها), and the beloved brother of Imam Hassan (عليه السلام) and Imam Hussain (عليه السلام), Hazrat Abbas stands as the eternal icon of sacrifice in Islamic history.
Known as Alamdar-e-Karbala and Saqqa-e-Sakina, his courage in the battlefield of Karbala reflects absolute devotion to Imam Hussain (عليه السلام). This spiritual Noha expresses grief, love, and respect for the tragedy of Karbala and the unwavering loyalty of Hazrat Abbas (عليه السلام), whose name continues to inspire believers across generations.

#Noha2026 #SherEBabbarAbbas #FarhanAliWaris #Muharram2026 #pakistan

=======================
NOHA LYRICS 
=======================
یا عباسؑ یا عباسؑ
تمہی سے آس لگائے اُداس بیٹھے ہیں
یہ پیاسے بچے جو زینبؑ کے پاس بیٹھے ہیں
عباسؑ کہاں ہو عباسؑ کہاں ہو

پانی زرا خیموں میں لاؤ غازیؑ
پانی سکینہ ع کو پلاو غازی ع

بچوں کو تم چہرا دکھاو غازی ع

اب تک نا پیاس بچھی خیمے کے در پہ کھڑی
روتی ہے کوزہ اُٹھائے
اصغرؑ کو دیکھتی ہے سب سے یہ پوچھتی ہے
میرے چچا کیوں نہ آئے
ُپانی اُسے لاکر پلاؤ غازیؑ

بولو عباسِ جریؑ کیوں اتنی دیر ہوئی
بچوں کو آکر سمبھالو
کرتے ہیں یاد تمہیں پھیلاکے ہاتھ اُنہیں 
سینے سے اپنے لگالو
دیکھا نہیں کب سے آجاؤ غازیؑ 

کوزے اُٹھالو سبھی آتے ہی ہونگے ابھی
مشکیزہ خیموں میں لیکے
لادینگے پانی ہمیں روکے گا کون اُنہیں 
عمو بہادر ہیں میرے
ٹوٹے نہ دِل بچوں کا آؤ غازیؑ

آجاؤ لوٹ کے گھر نیند آرہی ہے مگر
سوتی نہیں ہے سکینہؑ
تم کو معلوم ہے سب سوتی ہے پاس ہوں جب
تم اور بابا کا سینہ
لوری اُسے آکر سناؤ غازیؑ

جب سے یہ شور اُٹھا عباسؑ مارا گیا
ٹوٹی ہے سب پر قیامت
کرتے ہیں روکے دعا دریا پہ ہوں اے خدا
عمو ہمارے سلامت
حوصلہ بچوں کا بڑھاو غازیؑ

مقتل میں جو بھی گیا واپس نا لوٹ سکا
معصوم گھبرارہے ہیں
دکھتا نہیں ہے علم دل میں سقائے حرم
کیا کیا خیال آرہے ہیں
پھر سے زرا پرچم اُٹھاؤ غازیؑ

دریا پہ سب نے دیکھا
پرچمِ عباسؑ اُٹھا
بالی سکینہؑ نے کہا 
دیکھو وہ آتے ہیں چچا
جب وہ علم پاس آیا
بچوں کو کا دل ٹوٹ گیا
خون میں ڈوبا وہ علم
رکھ کے شہِ دیں نے کہا
قتل علمدار ہوگیا ہائے ہم غریب ہوگئے
شیر جیسا بھائی تھا میرا ہائے ہم غریب ہوگئے
بچوں نے کوزے پھینکے روکے علم سے لپٹے
دیکھو اے ذیشان و رضا دیتا ہے تاثیر صدا
یاد وہ منظر آیا شور تھا خیموں میں بپا
ہائے سکینہؑ ہائے پیاس ہائے سکینہؑ ہائے پیاس
=======================

Lyrics :-
Chup kar lang jaave kol di tu sang jaave
Ikko takkni ch tere rang vich rang jaave
Loki kehnde kithe jaayiye par asi khiche aayie
Kol di jado tu shanka ke saade vang jaave

Duniya di fikar bhula te sahi
Ki sochein saade baare samjha te sahi
Baaki sab tere baare puchi bethe aa 
Dil apne da dass raah te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi x2

Je puchdi aa keho jehe aa,shad de ni eho jehe aa 
Tere hone chaunde aa ni, Paavien asi jeho jehe aa
Dekh azma ke kude, apna bna ke kude
Tere bina hai ni koi, kehnde aa sounh khake kude

Sade naal thoda hass laa te sahi, naagan jyi bann dass laa te sahi
Banja tu raani kude saade dil di, deep deep aakh ke bula te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

Tenu pouna zidd dil di, mai v vekhda kidda ni mildi
Hor sohniya boht jag te, par tetho ni nigaah meri hildi
Oo kade na kade taa sade taakre, asi bewajah ni tere piche khabre
Billo sachiya preeta pouna chounde aa, aevien khaali feelinga ni kude chakk rahe

Sanu khush jeha rehna tu sikha te sahi
Mukkdi aa gall koi muka te sahi
Baaki diyan gallan aapa fer krange
Pehla ishq paheli samjha te sahi

Akhiyan nal akhiyan mila te sahi
Sadi sun apni suna te sahi
Sade naal dil jeha laa te sahi
Saadi hoja sanu apna bna te sahi

#sadisun #elvishyadav #simrattkaur #harshnussi #harshnussi
